title: centaurea paniculata subsp. micrantha
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. micrantha, also known as small-flowered knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea paniculata subsp. micrantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Centaurea paniculata subsp. micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
